hero.subtitle: Learn, certify, and serve with practical, hands-on training programs designed for individuals, institutions, and communities.

5.caption: Strong network of institutions and partners.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.subtitle: A complete ecosystem for first aid and emergency preparedness – from training to community engagement.

firstAidTraining.title: First Aid Training
firstAidTraining.description: Structured, certified courses that turn ordinary people into confident first responders.

communityOutreach.title: Community Outreach
communityOutreach.description: Awareness drives, workshops, and campaigns to build a culture of safety in communities.

institutionalPartnerships.title: Institutional Partnerships
institutionalPartnerships.description: Collaborations with schools, colleges, and corporates to embed lifesaving skills.

journey.title: Your Journey to Certification
journey.subtitle: Follow our simple 5-step process to become a certified first aid professional.

step01.label: Step 01
step01.title: Enrolment
step01.description: Register online or with your nearest centre.

step02.label: Step 02
step02.title: Training
step02.description: Attend practical sessions with expert trainers.

step03.label: Step 03
step03.title: Assessment
step03.description: Demonstrate your skills in guided evaluations.

step04.label: Step 04
step04.title: Certificate
step04.description: Receive your recognised first aid certification.

step05.label: Step 05
step05.title: Placement
step05.description: Apply your skills in real-world roles and services.

testimonials.title: What Our Students Say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from learners and professionals about their experience with our training programs.

leadership.title: Our Leadership
leadership.subtitle: Meet the team that makes our training programs possible.

training.title: Training in Action
training.subtitle: Take a glimpse at our training sessions and facilities.

courses.heroSubtitle: Explore our comprehensive range of Healthcare training and certification programs designed to equip you with life-saving skills.
